CustomField.description: The date for applying non repayable financial aid on transaction orders. This can be used by scheduled flow to update the “Apply Non Repayable Financial Aid” checkbox.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The date for applying non repayable financial aid on transaction orders. This can be used by scheduled flow to update the “Apply Non Repayable Financial Aid” checkbox.
CustomField.label: Apply Non Repayable FA Date
